ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric entry */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue reported by the company */,
  "gross_profit" TEXT /* Gross profit derived from the total revenue */,
  "operating_income" TEXT /* Operating income after operating expenses */,
  "net_income_pretax" TEXT /* Net income before taxes */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Net income after taxes */,
  "diluted_eps" TEXT /* Earnings per share (EPS) after accounting for all dilution */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the metric is reported */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business unit to which the metric applies */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the period for which the metric is reported */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the metric is reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the business unit */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager responsible for the business unit */,
  "parent_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent business unit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the business unit was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the business unit's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the business unit (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_units_parent_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business unit */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the period */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was last updated */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the specific metric for the given period and business unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_entries_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_entries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_entries_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_entries_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_entries_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_entries_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., financial, operational) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the period in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which financial metrics are reported */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
